title: docs: update README — 2026-07-14
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by Apps / Update metrics.)

gist.headline: Fresh pollen on the README
gist.blurb: The hive noticeboard got its daily rearrangement. Latest News is freshly pinned, while the apps shelf keeps tending itself.
gist.summary: Refreshed the root README's Latest News section as part of the daily project update.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the current Pollinations news without needing to dig through recent activity.
gist.visual_concept: Depict the README as a cozy lime-green community noticeboard in a garden shed, with fresh pixel news cards being pinned up. Polly wears tiny librarian glasses and updates the board while flowers and code-plants grow around it, making the routine documentation refresh feel like tending the hive's public noticeboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow bee mascot with dark brown stripes, pink rectangular blush, light blue wings, and tiny librarian glasses, pinning fresh news cards onto a warm cream README noticeboard beside blooming code-plants. The board and nearby retro terminal glow prominently in lime green (#ecf874), with soft mint, lavender, and peach gradients, subtle CRT glow, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes; pixel-font text: 'LATEST NEWS'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
